lex.bot.intentoverride.CfnAbout: Override settings to configure the intent state.

lex.bot.intentoverride.Name.Description: The name of the intent. Only required when you're switching intents.

lex.bot.intentoverride.Slots.Description: A map of all of the slot value overrides for the intent. The name of the slot maps to the value of the slot. Slots that are not included in the map aren't overridden.
